description_long: This object is a retro-style personal computer setup, featuring a boxy monitor with a prominent circular detail on the screen, a separate keyboard with raised keys, and a wired mouse. The monitor sits atop a rectangular base that includes two horizontal slots, reminiscent of floppy disk drives. The keyboard is full-sized and includes a number pad, while the mouse is a classic rectangular shape connected by a visible cable. The entire setup is rendered in a uniform matte blue color, giving it a stylized, monochromatic appearance. The design evokes early desktop computers from the 1980s, such as the Apple Macintosh, rather than a modern laptop.
description: A retro, boxy desktop computer setup with a monitor, keyboard, and wired mouse, all in matte blue. The design is reminiscent of early personal computers, not a modern laptop.
description_view_0: Front view showing the monitor with a circular detail, two drive slots, full keyboard, and wired mouse.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the monitor and the profile of the keyboard and mouse.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the monitor and the keyboard, with the mouse cable visible.
description_view_3: Right side view displaying the monitor's depth and the keyboard's side profile.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is closed or off, with no visible content displayed.
attribute_keyboard_layout: QWERTY layout with a number pad and function keys; all keys are uniformly colored and no special markings are visible.
